```{r q4_diag_winback_fixed, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
p_wb2 <- churn_pool %>%
  filter(!is.na(Customer_Type)) %>%
  group_by(Customer_Type) %>%
  summarise(
    wb_rate = sum(is_won_back) / n(),
    n_count = sum(is_won_back),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Customer_Type, y = wb_rate, fill = Customer_Type)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(percent(wb_rate, accuracy = 0.1), "\n(", n_count, ")")), 
            vjust = -0.2, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", lineheight = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, .2))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Core" = "#f57c00", "Non-Core" = "#90a4ae", "Whale/B2B" = "#b71c1c")) +
  labs(title = "Win-back Rate by Segment", subtitle = "Tỷ lệ hồi sinh khách hàng thực tế", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal()

p_wb1 | p_wb2
```

### 2.4 Gap Trend — Ai đang mua thưa dần?

```{r q4_diag_gap_trend, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# gap_trend > 0: khoảng cách giữa các đơn nở ra (nguy hiểm)
# gap_trend < 0: khoảng cách thu lại (tốt, đang tăng tần suất)
gap_trend_df <- lifecycle_full %>%
  filter(!is.na(gap_trend), n_orders >= 3, !is.na(Customer_Type)) %>%
  mutate(
    trend_label = case_when(
      gap_trend >  10 ~ "Drifting Away (>10d/order)",
      gap_trend >   0 ~ "Slightly Drifting (0–10d)",
      gap_trend < -10 ~ "Accelerating (<-10d/order)",
      TRUE            ~ "Stable (−10 to 0)"
    ),
    trend_label = factor(trend_label,
                         levels = c("Drifting Away (>10d/order)",
                                    "Slightly Drifting (0–10d)",
                                    "Stable (−10 to 0)",
                                    "Accelerating (<-10d/order)"))
  )

ggplot(gap_trend_df,
       aes(x = Customer_Type, fill = trend_label)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  geom_text(stat = "count",
            aes(label = ifelse(after_stat(count) /
                                 tapply(after_stat(count),
                                        after_stat(x), sum)[after_stat(x)] > 0.04,
                               percent(after_stat(count) /
                                         tapply(after_stat(count),
                                                after_stat(x), sum)[after_stat(x)],
                                       accuracy = 1), "")),
            position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Drifting Away (>10d/order)"  = "#d32f2f",
    "Slightly Drifting (0–10d)"   = "#ff9800",
    "Stable (−10 to 0)"           = "#90a4ae",
    "Accelerating (<-10d/order)"  = "#2e7d32"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  labs(
    title    = "Purchase Frequency Trend by Customer Type",
    subtitle = "% khách đang mua thưa dần (đỏ) vs tăng tần suất (xanh) | Chỉ tính khách có ≥ 3 đơn",
    x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "Trend"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

## 3. Predictive Analytics

### 3.1 Cohort Retention Forecast — ARIMA & ETS

```{r q4_pred_retention_forecast, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ret_ts_data <- avg_retention_qtr %>%
  filter(Cohort_Index >= 1, Cohort_Index <= 35) %>%
  arrange(Cohort_Index) %>%
  pull(Avg_Retention)

ret_ts <- ts(ret_ts_data, frequency = 1)

# Fit models
ets_fit   <- ets(ret_ts)
arima_fit <- auto.arima(ret_ts)

fc_ets   <- forecast(ets_fit,   h = 4)
fc_arima <- forecast(arima_fit, h = 4)

# Plot
# Bước 1: Dùng autoplot cho ETS trước, tắt mảng history mặc định để mình tự vẽ lại cho đẹp
autoplot(fc_ets, series = "ETS", PI = TRUE) +
  # Bước 2: Dùng autolayer cho ARIMA (Mean)
  autolayer(fc_arima$mean, series = "ARIMA", linewidth = 1.1) +
  # Bước 3: SỬA LỖI Ở ĐÂY - Dùng autolayer cho ret_ts để tự động nối Quarter 16 sang Quarter 17
  autolayer(ret_ts, series = "History", linewidth = 1.3) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
  # Bước 4: SỬA LỖI WARNING - Map đúng 3 nhãn đã định nghĩa ở trên vào bảng màu
  scale_color_manual(values = c("History" = "#1565c0", "ETS" = "#1976d2", "ARIMA" = "#d32f2f")) +
  
  labs(
    title    = "Cohort Retention Forecast — ETS vs ARIMA (next 4 quarters)",
    subtitle = "Đường xanh đậm = Lịch sử | Dự báo: ETS (xanh nhạt + vùng tin cậy) vs ARIMA (đỏ)",
    x = "Quarter Index", y = "Avg Retention Rate",
    color    = "Series"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), legend.position = "bottom")
```

### 3.2 Churn Prediction — XGBoost với Dynamic Churn Label

```{r q4_pred_churn_prep, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidymodels)
library(xgboost)
library(vip)
library(kableExtra)

# ==========================================
# BƯỚC 1: PREPARE DATA 
# ==========================================
churn_ml_unbiased <- lifecycle_full %>%
  filter(!is.na(Customer_Type), !is.na(is_dynamic_churned)) %>%
  left_join(
    rfm_behavior %>% select(customer_id, discount_dependency, n_unique_products),
    by = "customer_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    gap_trend           = coalesce(gap_trend, 0),
    avg_gap             = coalesce(avg_gap, median(avg_gap, na.rm = TRUE)),
    discount_dependency = coalesce(discount_dependency, 0),
    n_unique_products   = coalesce(n_unique_products, 1),
   
    # is_dynamic_churned = 1 là churned, 0 là active
    churned             = factor(is_dynamic_churned, 
                                 levels = c(1, 0), 
                                 labels = c("churned", "active"))
  ) %>%
  select(
    churned,
    n_orders, total_revenue, avg_gap, gap_trend, 
    tenure_days, n_unique_products, discount_dependency, 
    age_group, acquisition_channel, Customer_Type
  ) %>%
  drop_na()

# ==========================================
# BUOC 2: TRAIN/TEST SPLIT & RECIPE
# ==========================================
set.seed(123)
# Chia data theo ty le 80/20, giu nguyen ti le nhan (strata)
churn_split <- initial_split(churn_ml_unbiased, prop = 0.8, strata = churned)
train_data  <- training(churn_split)
test_data   <- testing(churn_split)

# Tao Recipe de tien xu ly du lieu
churn_recipe <- recipe(churned ~ ., data = train_data) %>%
  # Chuyen bien category sang Dummy variables (One-hot encoding)
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors(), one_hot = TRUE) %>%
  # Loai bo cac bien co bien thien bang 0
  step_zv(all_predictors()) %>%
  # Chuan hoa cac bien so ve cung mot thang do
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

# ==========================================
# BUOC 3: MODEL SPEC & WORKFLOW
# ==========================================
# Cau hinh model XGBoost voi cac tham so kiem soat Overfitting
xgb_spec <- boost_tree(
  trees = 500, 
  tree_depth = 4,       # Do sau vua phai de model khong bi hoc vet
  learn_rate = 0.02,    # Toc do hoc cham de tim ra quy luat ben vung
  loss_reduction = 0.1
) %>%
  set_engine("xgboost") %>%
  set_mode("classification")

xgb_workflow <- workflow() %>%
  add_recipe(churn_recipe) %>%
  add_model(xgb_spec)

# Tien hanh huan luyen model
xgb_fit <- xgb_workflow %>% fit(data = train_data)

# ==========================================
# BUOC 4: EVALUATION (DANH GIA THUC TE)
# ==========================================
# Du bao tren tap Test de kiem tra do chinh xac thuc te
results <- test_data %>%
  select(churned) %>%
  bind_cols(predict(xgb_fit, test_data, type = "prob")) %>%
  bind_cols(predict(xgb_fit, test_data))

# Tinh toan cac chi so model
model_metrics <- metrics(results, truth = churned, estimate = .pred_class)
auc_val <- roc_auc(results, truth = churned, .pred_churned)

# Truc quan hoa duong cong ROC
p_roc_new <- results %>%
  roc_curve(truth = churned, .pred_churned) %>%
  autoplot() +
  labs(title = "ROC Curve (Unbiased Model)", 
       subtitle = paste0("AUC = ", round(auc_val$.estimate, 4), " (Khong bi leakage boi Recency)")) +
  theme_minimal()

# Truc quan hoa cac bien quan trong nhat (Feature Importance)
p_vip_new <- xgb_fit %>%
  extract_fit_parsnip() %>%
  vip(num_features = 10, geom = "col", aesthetics = list(fill = "#E67E22")) +
  labs(title = "Feature Importance (Behavioral)",
       subtitle = "Top cac hanh vi thuc su dan den rui ro Churn") +
  theme_minimal()

# Hien thi ket qua biểu đồ ghép
print(p_roc_new | p_vip_new)

# In bang chi so ra console
cat("\n--- BANG CHI SO MODEL ---\n")
print(model_metrics)
```

## 4. Prescriptive Analytics

### 4.1 Intervention Timing — Ngưỡng nào cần trigger campaign?

```{r q4_presc_timing, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Tính median gap + trigger threshold cho 11 segment
inter_order_labelled <- inter_order_delivered %>%
  filter(!is.na(Gap_Days)) %>%
  left_join(
    lifecycle_full %>% select(customer_id, Customer_Type,
                              is_dynamic_churned),
    by = "customer_id"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    rfm_raw %>% select(customer_id, Segment),
    by = "customer_id"
  )

intervention_thresholds <- inter_order_labelled %>%
  filter(!is.na(Segment), Segment != "Others", !is.na(Gap_Days)) %>%
  group_by(Segment) %>%
  summarise(
    n_customers      = n_distinct(customer_id),
    median_gap       = round(median(Gap_Days, na.rm = TRUE)),
    p75_gap          = round(quantile(Gap_Days, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)),
    # Trigger = 1.5× median gap của chính segment đó
    trigger_day      = ceiling(median_gap * 1.5),
    urgent_day       = ceiling(median_gap * 2.0),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(trigger_day)

kable(intervention_thresholds,
      caption = "Intervention Timing Thresholds by RFM Segment",
      col.names = c("Segment", "N Customers", "Median Gap (d)",
                    "P75 Gap (d)", "Trigger Day (1.5×)", "Urgent Day (2×)"),
      format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(5, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "#f57c00") %>%
  column_spec(6, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "#d32f2f")
```

```{r q4_presc_atrisk_now, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Khách đang ở VÙNG NGUY HIỂM ngay hôm nay
# (days_since_last nằm giữa trigger_day và urgent_day)
at_risk_today <- lifecycle_full %>%
  filter(!is.na(Segment), Segment != "Others", is_dynamic_churned == 0) %>%
  left_join(intervention_thresholds %>%
              select(Segment, trigger_day, urgent_day),
            by = "Segment") %>%
  filter(Recency >= trigger_day,
         Recency <  urgent_day) %>%
  count(Segment, acquisition_channel, name = "n_at_risk") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_at_risk))

cat("Tổng khách đang ở vùng nguy hiểm:", sum(at_risk_today$n_at_risk), "\n\n")

at_risk_today %>%
  head(15) %>%
  kable(caption = "Top 15 Segment × Channel cần trigger ngay hôm nay") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = FALSE)
```

## 4.2 Win-back Priority List

```{r q4_presc_winback_priority_refined, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(scales)
library(kableExtra)

seg_wb_rate <- lifecycle_full %>%
  filter(!is.na(Segment)) %>%
  left_join(
    customers_won_back %>%
      distinct(customer_id) %>%
      mutate(did_winback = 1L),
    by = "customer_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(did_winback = replace_na(did_winback, 0L)) %>%
  group_by(Segment) %>%
  summarise(winback_rate = mean(did_winback), .groups = "drop")

# Priority score = Monetary × winback_rate (proxy CLV × P(return))
winback_priority <- lifecycle_full %>%
  filter(is_dynamic_churned == 1, !is.na(Segment), Segment != "Others") %>%
  left_join(churn_scores %>% select(customer_id, churn_prob),
            by = "customer_id") %>%
  left_join(seg_wb_rate, by = "Segment") %>%
  mutate(
    winback_rate   = replace_na(winback_rate, 0),
    priority_score = total_revenue * winback_rate   # CLV proxy × P(return)
  ) %>%
  filter(priority_score > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(priority_score)) %>%
  select(customer_id, Segment, Customer_Type, acquisition_channel,
         Recency, total_revenue, winback_rate, priority_score)

cat("Churned customers trong priority list:", nrow(winback_priority), "\n\n")

winback_priority %>%
  head(20) %>%
  kable(digits = c(0,0,0,0,0,0,3,0),
        format.args = list(big.mark = ","),
        caption = "Top 20 Win-back Priority List (Sorted by Priority Score)") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(8, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "#2e7d32")
```

## 4.3 Prescriptive Playbook — Action Table

```{r q4_presc_playbook, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# 1. Tính toán mức chiết khấu trung bình và số lượng khách theo từng Segment
# Dựa trên dữ liệu từ rfm_behavior và lifecycle_full đã assign
seg_behavior <- rfm_behavior %>%
  left_join(lifecycle_full %>% select(customer_id, Segment) %>% distinct(), by = "customer_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Segment), Segment != "Others") %>%
  group_by(Segment) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_discount_pct = mean(discount_dependency, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_monetary  = median(total_revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_customers      = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 2. Lấy ngưỡng can thiệp (Trigger) từ luật Dynamic Churn đã tính
seg_thresholds <- lifecycle_full %>%
  filter(!is.na(Segment), Segment != "Others") %>%
  group_by(Segment) %>%
  summarise(
    trigger_day = floor(mean(Dynamic_Threshold, na.rm = TRUE)),
    urgent_day  = trigger_day + 30, # Mốc khẩn cấp: sau 1 tháng kể từ ngày can thiệp
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 3. Gộp tất cả lại thành Playbook (seg_wb_rate lấy từ Step 4.2 trước đó)
playbook <- seg_thresholds %>%
  left_join(seg_wb_rate, by = "Segment") %>%
  left_join(seg_behavior, by = "Segment") %>%
  mutate(
    # ROI proxy = (Giá trị kỳ vọng thu hồi) / (Chi phí giảm giá dự kiến)
    roi_proxy = ifelse(avg_discount_pct > 0, 
                       (median_monetary * winback_rate) / (median_monetary * avg_discount_pct), 
                       NA_real_),
    
    recommended_action = case_when(
      Segment %in% c("Champions", "Loyal Customers") ~ 
        "Loyalty reward / early access — KHÔNG mass discount",
      Segment == "Potential Loyalist" ~ 
        paste0("Personalized next-product rec. Trigger tại ngày ", trigger_day),
      Segment %in% c("Needs Attention", "About To Sleep") ~ 
        paste0("Email trigger tại ngày ", trigger_day, " (urgency copy)"),
      Segment %in% c("Can't Lose Them", "Hibernating") ~ 
        paste0("Win-back SMS + voucher tại ngày ", trigger_day),
      Segment == "Lost" ~ 
        "Win-back chỉ nếu ROI > 1.2; ngược lại drop sang email tự động",
      Segment %in% c("Promising", "Recent Users", "Price Sensitive") ~ 
        "Bundle offer / freeship để tăng frequency",
      TRUE ~ "Monitor"
    ),
    
    channel_rec = case_when(
      Segment %in% c("Champions", "Loyal Customers") ~ "Direct / Email Private",
      Segment %in% c("Potential Loyalist", "Recent Users") ~ "Social Media Ads",
      Segment %in% c("Needs Attention", "About To Sleep") ~ "Email Automation",
      Segment %in% c("Can't Lose Them", "Hibernating") ~ "SMS / Tele-marketing",
      Segment == "Price Sensitive" ~ "In-app Notification",
      TRUE ~ "Email / Notification"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(median_monetary)) %>%
  select(Segment, n_customers, trigger_day, urgent_day, 
         winback_rate, median_monetary, roi_proxy, 
         recommended_action, channel_rec)

# 4. Hiển thị bảng đẹp mắt bằng kableExtra
# Lưu ý: Cột ROI Proxy sẽ được đổ màu dựa trên giá trị để dễ nhận diện
kable(playbook, 
      caption = "Prescriptive Playbook — Data-Driven Action by Segment",
      col.names = c("Segment", "N", "Trigger", "Urgent", 
                    "Winback Rate", "Median LTV", "ROI Proxy", 
                    "Recommended Action", "Channel"),
      digits = c(0, 0, 0, 0, 3, 0, 1, 0, 0),
      format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), 
                full_width = TRUE, font_size = 11) %>%
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE) %>%
  column_spec(7, bold = TRUE, color = "white", 
              background = spec_color(playbook$roi_proxy, end = 0.7, option = "viridis", na_color = "#BBBBBB")) %>%
  column_spec(8, bold = TRUE) %>%
  column_spec(9, italic = TRUE, color = "#1565c0")
```

# Q5: Acquisition Channel nào mang lại LTV tốt nhất?

## 1. Descriptive Analytics — Tổng quan Channel Performance

### 1.1. BẢNG TỔNG QUAN CHANNEL — Revenue, Volume, AOV, Discount Dependency

```{r q5_channel_descriptive, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)


channel_overview <- df_delivered %>%
  group_by(acquisition_channel) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Customers   = n_distinct(customer_id),
    Total_Revenue     = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    Total_Orders      = n_distinct(order_id),
    AOV               = Total_Revenue / Total_Orders,
    Revenue_Per_Cust  = Total_Revenue / Total_Customers,
    Avg_Discount_Dep  = sum(discount_amount, na.rm = TRUE) /
                        sum(quantity * unit_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Total_Revenue))

kable(channel_overview,
      digits  = c(0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 3),
      caption = "Performance Overview by Acquisition Channel",
      col.names = c("Channel", "Customers", "Revenue", "Orders",
                    "AOV", "Rev/Customer", "Discount Dep."),
      format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(6, bold = TRUE, color = "white",
              background = spec_color(channel_overview$Revenue_Per_Cust,
                                      end = 0.7, option = "viridis"))
```

### 1.2. BUBBLE CHART — Volume vs. Efficiency (Phân vùng chiến lược 4 góc)

```{r q5_channel_bubble, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(channel_overview,
       aes(x = Total_Customers, y = Revenue_Per_Cust,
           size = Total_Revenue, label = acquisition_channel)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Avg_Discount_Dep), alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_text(vjust = -1.2, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(5, 20), labels = comma) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "steelblue", high = "firebrick",
                       name = "Discount\nDependency") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = comma) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = median(channel_overview$Revenue_Per_Cust),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = median(channel_overview$Total_Customers),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = "High Value\nLarge Base",
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 3, color = "darkgreen", fontface = "italic") +
  annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = "High Value\nSmall Base",
           hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 3, color = "darkorange", fontface = "italic") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = "Low Value\nLarge Base",
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "firebrick", fontface = "italic") +
  annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = -Inf, label = "Low Value\nSmall Base",
           hjust = -0.1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "gray40", fontface = "italic") +
  labs(
    title    = "Channel Strategy Matrix: Volume vs. Revenue per Customer",
    subtitle = "Bubble size = Total Revenue | Color = Discount Dependency",
    x        = "Total Customers (Volume)",
    y        = "Revenue per Customer (Efficiency)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
```

## 2. Diagnostic Analytics — Chất lượng Customer từng Channel

### 2.1. PHÂN BỔ CUSTOMER TYPE (11 nhóm RFM) THEO CHANNEL

```{r q5_channel_quality, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(forcats) # Thư viện cực mạnh để xử lý sắp xếp (reorder)

# --- BƯỚC 1: LÀM SẠCH DATA GỐC ---
df_plot_base <- lifecycle_full %>%
  filter(!is.na(acquisition_channel), 
         acquisition_channel != "", 
         acquisition_channel != "o",
         !is.na(Segment), Segment != "Others",
         !is.na(Customer_Type))

# --- BƯỚC 2: TẠO BẢNG SUMMARY CHO SEGMENT (BAR 1) ---
dist_segment <- df_plot_base %>%
  count(Segment, acquisition_channel) %>%
  group_by(Segment) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n), total = sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(Segment = fct_reorder(Segment, total),
         acquisition_channel = fct_reorder(acquisition_channel, pct))

# --- BƯỚC 3: TẠO BẢNG SUMMARY CHO CUSTOMER TYPE (BAR 2) ---
# Quan trọng: Tính lại pct dựa trên Customer_Type để ko bị cộng dồn sai
dist_type <- df_plot_base %>%
  count(Customer_Type, acquisition_channel) %>%
  group_by(Customer_Type) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n), total = sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(Customer_Type = fct_reorder(Customer_Type, total),
         acquisition_channel = fct_reorder(acquisition_channel, pct))

# --- BƯỚC 4: VẼ BIỂU ĐỒ ---

# Bar 1: Theo Segment
ggplot(dist_segment, aes(x = Segment, y = pct, fill = acquisition_channel)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(pct > 0.05, percent(pct, accuracy = 1), "")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5, reverse = TRUE), size = 3, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2", name = "Channel") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Mix by Segment", x = "RFM Segment", y = "% Contribution") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none")


```

```{r q5_channel_rfm_heatmap, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 2: HEATMAP — Phân phối 11 RFM Segment theo Channel
# ==========================================================================
channel_segment_matrix <- rfm_raw %>%
  left_join(df_delivered %>% distinct(customer_id, acquisition_channel),
            by = "customer_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(acquisition_channel),
         acquisition_channel != "",
         acquisition_channel != "o",
         !is.na(Segment), Segment != "Others") %>%
  count(acquisition_channel, Segment) %>%
  group_by(acquisition_channel) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(channel_segment_matrix,
       aes(x = acquisition_channel,
           y = reorder(Segment, pct),
           fill = pct)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = percent(pct, accuracy = 0.1)), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#f7fbff", high = "#08306b",
                      labels = percent_format(),
                      name = "% Customers") +
  labs(title    = "RFM Segment Distribution by Acquisition Channel",
       subtitle = "Heatmap cho thấy channel nào tập trung khách Champions/Loyal?",
       x = "Channel", y = "RFM Segment") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

```{r q5_channel_payment_device, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 3: HÀNH VI THANH TOÁN & THIẾT BỊ — Diagnostic bổ sung
# ==========================================================================
channel_behavior <- df_delivered %>%
  filter(!is.na(acquisition_channel), acquisition_channel != "o") %>%
  group_by(acquisition_channel) %>%
  summarise(
    pct_mobile       = mean(device_type == "mobile", na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_promo_order  = mean(is_promo == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_quantity     = mean(quantity, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p_mobile <- ggplot(channel_behavior,
       aes(x = reorder(acquisition_channel, pct_mobile),
           y = pct_mobile, fill = acquisition_channel)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Mobile Usage Rate", x = NULL, y = "% Orders on Mobile") +
  theme_minimal()

p_promo <- ggplot(channel_behavior,
       aes(x = reorder(acquisition_channel, pct_promo_order),
           y = pct_promo_order, fill = acquisition_channel)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Promo Usage Rate", x = NULL, y = "% Orders with Promo") +
  theme_minimal()

(p_mobile | p_promo) +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Behavioral Fingerprint per Channel",
    subtitle = "Diagnostic: Khách từ kênh nào phụ thuộc promo và ưa mobile?"
  )
```

## 3. Predictive Analytics — LTV & Conversion Modelling

```{r q5_channel_predictive_convert, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 1: TIME TO FIRST ORDER — Kênh nào chuyển đổi nhanh nhất?
# ==========================================================================
time_to_convert <- df_delivered %>%
  group_by(customer_id) %>%
  slice_min(order_date, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(days_to_convert = as.numeric(
    difftime(order_date, signup_date, units = "days"))) %>%
  filter(days_to_convert >= 0,
         !is.na(acquisition_channel),
         acquisition_channel != "o")

# Summary thống kê rõ ràng
convert_summary <- time_to_convert %>%
  group_by(acquisition_channel) %>%
  summarise(
    median_days = median(days_to_convert, na.rm = TRUE),
    p25_days    = quantile(days_to_convert, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    p75_days    = quantile(days_to_convert, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    n           = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(median_days)

ggplot(time_to_convert,
       aes(x = reorder(acquisition_channel, days_to_convert, FUN = median),
           y = days_to_convert, fill = acquisition_channel)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.4, trim = TRUE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.2, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "text",
               aes(label = round(..y.., 0)),
               hjust = -0.3, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 60)) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title    = "Time to First Purchase by Channel (Violin + Box)",
       subtitle = "Giới hạn 60 ngày | Số ghi là Median Days to Convert",
       x = "Channel", y = "Days to First Order") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r q5_channel_ltv_proxy, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 2: PROXY LTV — Historical LTV annualised + Cohort LTV Projection
# ==========================================================================

# A. Proxy Annual LTV 
channel_ltv <- rfm_behavior %>%
  left_join(df %>% distinct(customer_id, acquisition_channel), by = "customer_id") %>%
  filter(tenure_days > 30,
         !is.na(acquisition_channel),
         acquisition_channel != "o") %>%
  mutate(Estimated_Annual_Value = (total_revenue / tenure_days) * 365) %>%
  group_by(acquisition_channel) %>%
  summarise(
    N                = n(),
    Median_Annual_LTV = median(Estimated_Annual_Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    Avg_Annual_LTV    = mean(Estimated_Annual_Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    P90_Annual_LTV    = quantile(Estimated_Annual_Value, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Median_Annual_LTV))

kable(channel_ltv,
      digits  = c(0, 0, 0, 0, 0),
      caption = "Estimated Annual LTV by Channel (Historic Proxy)",
      col.names = c("Channel", "N", "Median Annual LTV",
                    "Avg Annual LTV", "P90 Annual LTV"),
      format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(3, bold = TRUE, color = "white",
              background = spec_color(channel_ltv$Median_Annual_LTV,
                                      end = 0.7, option = "plasma"))
```

```{r q5_channel_ltv_model, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 3: RANDOM FOREST — Dự đoán LTV từ channel + demographics + behavior
# ==========================================================================
library(tidymodels)
library(vip)
library(ranger)  # Fast Random Forest engine

# Chuẩn bị dataset: 1 dòng = 1 khách hàng
ltv_model_data <- rfm_behavior %>%
  left_join(df %>% distinct(customer_id, acquisition_channel, gender,
                             age_group, signup_date), by = "customer_id") %>%
  left_join(lifecycle_full %>% select(customer_id, Segment,
                                      is_dynamic_churned), by = "customer_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(acquisition_channel), acquisition_channel != "o",
         !is.na(total_revenue), total_revenue > 0,
         !is.na(age_group), !is.na(gender)) %>%
  mutate(
    log_ltv = log1p(total_revenue),       # Biến mục tiêu: log-transform để ổn định
    tenure_months = tenure_days / 30
  ) %>%
  select(log_ltv, acquisition_channel, gender, age_group,
         Frequency, tenure_months, discount_dependency,
         n_unique_products, AOV, is_dynamic_churned) %>%
  drop_na()

# Train/Test split
set.seed(2024)
ltv_split <- initial_split(ltv_model_data, prop = 0.8)
ltv_train  <- training(ltv_split)
ltv_test   <- testing(ltv_split)

# Recipe
ltv_recipe <- recipe(log_ltv ~ ., data = ltv_train) %>%
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors(), one_hot = TRUE) %>%
  step_zv(all_predictors()) %>%
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

# Random Forest spec (ranger = nhanh hơn randomForest)
rf_spec <- rand_forest(trees = 300, mtry = 4, min_n = 10) %>%
  set_engine("ranger", importance = "impurity") %>%
  set_mode("regression")

rf_workflow <- workflow() %>%
  add_recipe(ltv_recipe) %>%
  add_model(rf_spec)

rf_fit <- rf_workflow %>% fit(data = ltv_train)

# Đánh giá mô hình
rf_preds <- ltv_test %>%
  bind_cols(predict(rf_fit, ltv_test) %>% rename(pred_log_ltv = .pred)) %>%
  mutate(pred_ltv  = expm1(pred_log_ltv),
         actual_ltv = expm1(log_ltv))

rf_rmse <- rmse(rf_preds, truth = log_ltv, estimate = pred_log_ltv)
rf_r2   <- rsq(rf_preds, truth = log_ltv, estimate = pred_log_ltv)

cat(sprintf("RF Model — RMSE (log scale): %.4f | R²: %.4f\n",
            rf_rmse$.estimate, rf_r2$.estimate))

# Biểu đồ Feature Importance
p_vip_ltv <- rf_fit %>%
  extract_fit_parsnip() %>%
  vip(num_features = 12, geom = "col",
      aesthetics = list(fill = "#2980B9", alpha = 0.85)) +
  labs(title    = "Feature Importance — LTV Prediction Model",
       subtitle = "Channel có ảnh hưởng bao nhiêu so với behavior signals?") +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_vip_ltv)

# Predicted LTV by Channel — Dùng model để "normalize" hành vi
predicted_by_channel <- ltv_test %>%
  bind_cols(predict(rf_fit, ltv_test) %>% rename(pred_log_ltv = .pred)) %>%
  mutate(pred_ltv = expm1(pred_log_ltv)) %>%
  group_by(acquisition_channel) %>%
  summarise(Model_Predicted_Median_LTV = median(pred_ltv, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(Model_Predicted_Median_LTV))

kable(predicted_by_channel,
      digits = 0,
      format.args = list(big.mark = ","),
      caption = "Model-Predicted Median LTV by Channel (RF Regression)",
      col.names = c("Channel", "Predicted Median LTV")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r q5_channel_cohort_retention, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 4: COHORT RETENTION RATE THEO CHANNEL (tháng đầu tiên mua hàng)
# ==========================================================================
first_order_date <- df_delivered %>%
  group_by(customer_id) %>%
  summarise(first_order_month = floor_date(min(order_date), "month"),
            .groups = "drop")

cohort_channel <- df_delivered %>%
  group_by(customer_id, order_month = floor_date(order_date, "month")) %>%
  summarise(revenue = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(first_order_date, by = "customer_id") %>%
  left_join(df %>% distinct(customer_id, acquisition_channel), by = "customer_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(acquisition_channel), acquisition_channel != "o") %>%
  mutate(cohort_month = as.numeric(
    difftime(order_month, first_order_month, units = "weeks")) %/% 4)

# Retention rate: % khách quay lại tháng 1, 2, 3
channel_retention <- cohort_channel %>%
  filter(cohort_month <= 6) %>%
  group_by(acquisition_channel, cohort_month) %>%
  summarise(n_active = n_distinct(customer_id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(acquisition_channel) %>%
  mutate(retention_rate = n_active / first(n_active)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(channel_retention,
       aes(x = cohort_month, y = retention_rate,
           color = acquisition_channel, group = acquisition_channel)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:6) +
  labs(title    = "Cohort Retention Rate by Acquisition Channel (Month 0–6)",
       subtitle = "Kênh nào giữ chân khách lâu nhất sau tháng đầu tiên?",
       x = "Month Since First Purchase", y = "Retention Rate",
       color = "Channel") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```

## 4. Prescriptive Analytics — Tối ưu Marketing Mix

```{r q5_channel_cac_estimate, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 1: LTV:CAC PROXY — Tính ROI proxy từng kênh
# ==========================================================================

# CAC proxy dựa trên discount + promo chi phí gián tiếp
channel_cost_proxy <- df_delivered %>%
  filter(!is.na(acquisition_channel), acquisition_channel != "o") %>%
  group_by(acquisition_channel) %>%
  summarise(
    n_customers        = n_distinct(customer_id),
    total_discount_cost = sum(discount_amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_discount_per_cust = total_discount_cost / n_distinct(customer_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Gộp LTV + CAC proxy
channel_roi <- channel_ltv %>%
  left_join(channel_cost_proxy, by = "acquisition_channel") %>%
  mutate(
    # LTV:CAC ratio (cao hơn = kênh tốt hơn về ROI)
    LTV_CAC_ratio = Median_Annual_LTV / pmax(avg_discount_per_cust, 1),
    # Channel tier
    Channel_Tier = case_when(
      LTV_CAC_ratio >= quantile(LTV_CAC_ratio, 0.67, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Tier 1 — Scale Up",
      LTV_CAC_ratio >= quantile(LTV_CAC_ratio, 0.33, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Tier 2 — Optimise",
      TRUE                                                          ~ "Tier 3 — Reduce / Test"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(LTV_CAC_ratio)) %>%
  select(acquisition_channel, N, Median_Annual_LTV,
         avg_discount_per_cust, LTV_CAC_ratio, Channel_Tier)

kable(channel_roi,
      digits  = c(0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0),
      caption = "Channel ROI Matrix — LTV:CAC Proxy",
      col.names = c("Channel", "N Customers", "Median Annual LTV",
                    "Avg Discount/Customer", "LTV:CAC Proxy", "Tier"),
      format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(5, bold = TRUE, color = "white",
              background = spec_color(channel_roi$LTV_CAC_ratio,
                                      end = 0.7, option = "viridis")) %>%
  column_spec(6, bold = TRUE,
              color = ifelse(channel_roi$Channel_Tier == "Tier 1 — Scale Up",
                             "darkgreen", "black"))
```

```{r q5_channel_budget_allocation, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 2: BUDGET ALLOCATION RECOMMENDATION (Linear Optimisation Proxy)
# ==========================================================================

# Giả sử tổng budget = 100 đơn vị, phân bổ theo LTV:CAC weighted
total_budget_units <- 100

channel_budget <- channel_roi %>%
  mutate(
    # Weight = LTV:CAC ratio (cao hơn → được nhiều budget hơn)
    weight = LTV_CAC_ratio / sum(LTV_CAC_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Budget allocation
    budget_allocation = round(weight * total_budget_units, 1),
    # Dự kiến revenue nếu scale thêm 1 đơn vị budget
    marginal_return = Median_Annual_LTV * weight
  ) %>%
  select(acquisition_channel, Channel_Tier, LTV_CAC_ratio,
         weight, budget_allocation, marginal_return)

p_budget <- ggplot(channel_budget,
       aes(x = reorder(acquisition_channel, budget_allocation),
           y = budget_allocation,
           fill = Channel_Tier)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(budget_allocation, "%")),
            hjust = -0.1, fontface = "bold", size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Tier 1 — Scale Up"      = "#27AE60",
                               "Tier 2 — Optimise"      = "#F39C12",
                               "Tier 3 — Reduce / Test" = "#C0392B")) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(channel_budget$budget_allocation) * 1.2)) +
  labs(title    = "Recommended Marketing Budget Allocation by Channel",
       subtitle = "Dựa trên LTV:CAC Proxy | Tổng = 100 đơn vị",
       x = NULL, y = "Budget Allocation (%)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

print(p_budget)
```

```{r q5_channel_retargeting, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 3: RETARGETING LIST — High-Value Customers by Channel để ưu tiên
# ==========================================================================

# Top customers theo channel, lọc Core + Whale + chưa churn
retarget_priority <- lifecycle_full %>%
  filter(is_dynamic_churned == 0,
         Customer_Type %in% c("Core", "Whale/B2B")) %>%
  left_join(rfm_behavior %>% select(customer_id, AOV), by = "customer_id") %>%
  group_by(acquisition_channel) %>%
  summarise(
    n_high_value_active = n(),
    total_revenue_at_risk = sum(total_revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_ltv = median(total_revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(acquisition_channel), acquisition_channel != "o") %>%
  arrange(desc(total_revenue_at_risk))

kable(retarget_priority,
      digits  = c(0, 0, 0, 0),
      caption = "Retargeting Priority: Active High-Value Customers by Channel",
      col.names = c("Channel", "Active HV Customers",
                    "Revenue at Stake", "Median LTV"),
      format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r q5_channel_playbook, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 4: CHANNEL STRATEGY PLAYBOOK — Action Table tổng hợp
# ==========================================================================
library(tibble)

channel_playbook <- tribble(
  ~Channel,          ~Tier,                   ~Insight,                                             ~Action,                                                  ~KPI,
  "organic_search",  "Evaluate",              "Largest base nhưng cần verify quality vs paid",       "SEO content targeting high-intent keywords, A/B test landing pages", "Core% & Retention M3",
  "social_media",    "Scale / Optimise",      "High mobile usage, good for brand awareness",         "Lookalike audiences từ Core customers, retarget lapsed", "CAC & Conv. Rate",
  "paid_search",     "Optimise ROI",          "High intent nhưng discount-sensitive",                "Smart bidding, exclude low-LTV segments, bid up on Whale profiles", "LTV:CAC, ROAS",
  "email_campaign",  "Scale — Low Cost",      "Low cost channel, nurture existing base",             "Segment-triggered flows (Q4 thresholds), win-back sequences", "Open rate, Repeat purchase%",
  "referral",        "Scale if LTV high",     "Referred users tend to have better retention",        "Referral programme incentive optimisation, track referrer LTV", "Referral LTV vs organic",
  "direct",          "Protect — High LTV",    "Likely loyal / brand-aware customers",                "VIP programme, early access, loyalty rewards — NO mass promo", "Churn rate, NPS"
)

kable(channel_playbook,
      caption = "Q5 Channel Strategy Playbook — Prescriptive Action Table",
      col.names = c("Channel", "Tier", "Key Insight", "Recommended Action", "Success KPI")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE, font_size = 11) %>%
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE) %>%
  column_spec(4, italic = TRUE, color = "#1565c0") %>%
  row_spec(which(channel_playbook$Tier %in% c("Scale / Optimise", "Scale — Low Cost",
                                               "Scale if LTV high", "Protect — High LTV")),
           background = "#f0fff0")
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# OVERALL: Predictive & Prescriptive Tổng Thể Dataset

## OV-1. Customer Revenue Forecasting — ARIMA + Prophet

```{r overall_revenue_forecast, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(forecast)
library(lubridate)

# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 1: AGGREGATE MONTHLY REVENUE TIME SERIES
# ==========================================================================
monthly_revenue <- df_delivered %>%
  mutate(month = floor_date(order_date, "month")) %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(revenue = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(month)

# Loại bỏ tháng cuối nếu chưa đủ dữ liệu (< 15 ngày)
last_month_days <- df_delivered %>%
  mutate(month = floor_date(order_date, "month")) %>%
  filter(month == max(month)) %>%
  summarise(n_days = n_distinct(as.Date(order_date))) %>%
  pull(n_days)

if (last_month_days < 15) {
  monthly_revenue <- monthly_revenue %>% slice(-n())
}

rev_ts <- ts(monthly_revenue$revenue,
             start = c(year(min(monthly_revenue$month)),
                       month(min(monthly_revenue$month))),
             frequency = 12)

# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 2: AUTO ARIMA
# ==========================================================================
arima_fit     <- auto.arima(rev_ts, seasonal = TRUE, stepwise = FALSE)
arima_forecast <- forecast(arima_fit, h = 6)

autoplot(arima_forecast) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(title    = "Revenue Forecast — ARIMA (Next 6 Months)",
       subtitle  = sprintf("Model: %s | AICc = %.1f",
                           arima_fit$arma %>% paste(collapse=","),
                           arima_fit$aicc),
       x = "Month", y = "Forecasted Revenue") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
```

```{r overall_stl_decomp, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 3: STL DECOMPOSITION — Tách trend, seasonality, residual
# ==========================================================================
if (length(rev_ts) >= 24) {  # STL cần ít nhất 2 chu kỳ
  stl_fit <- stl(rev_ts, s.window = "periodic")
  autoplot(stl_fit) +
    labs(title = "Revenue Decomposition (STL)",
         subtitle = "Trend / Seasonality / Residual — Cơ cấu tăng trưởng") +
    theme_minimal()
} else {
  cat("Cần ít nhất 24 tháng để chạy STL decomposition.\n")
  cat(sprintf("Dataset hiện có %d tháng.\n", length(rev_ts)))
}
```

## OV-2. Customer Segmentation — Unsupervised Clustering (K-Means + PCA)

```{r overall_kmeans_pca, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(factoextra)
library(cluster)

# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 1: CHUẨN BỊ FEATURE MATRIX (RFM + Behavior)
# ==========================================================================
cluster_features <- rfm_behavior %>%
  left_join(lifecycle_full %>% select(customer_id, is_dynamic_churned,
                                       tenure_days), by = "customer_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(total_revenue), total_revenue > 0) %>%
  select(customer_id, Recency, Frequency, total_revenue,
         AOV, discount_dependency,
         n_unique_products, is_dynamic_churned) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(across(-customer_id, ~ log1p(abs(.x))))  # Log-transform để giảm skew

cluster_matrix <- cluster_features %>%
  select(-customer_id) %>%
  scale()   # Chuẩn hóa Z-score

# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 2: ELBOW METHOD — Chọn số K tối ưu
# ==========================================================================
set.seed(42)
wss_vals <- sapply(2:8, function(k) {
  kmeans(cluster_matrix, centers = k, nstart = 10, iter.max = 50)$tot.withinss
})

elbow_df <- data.frame(k = 2:8, wss = wss_vals)
p_elbow <- ggplot(elbow_df, aes(x = k, y = wss)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Elbow Method — Optimal K for Customer Clustering",
       x = "Number of Clusters (K)", y = "Within-Cluster Sum of Squares") +
  theme_minimal()
print(p_elbow)

# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 3: K-MEANS với K tối ưu (thường là 4-5)
# ==========================================================================
optimal_k <- 4
km_fit <- kmeans(cluster_matrix, centers = optimal_k,
                 nstart = 25, iter.max = 100)

cluster_features$Cluster <- factor(km_fit$cluster)

# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 4: PCA VISUALISATION
# ==========================================================================
pca_res <- prcomp(cluster_matrix, center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE)
pca_df  <- as.data.frame(pca_res$x[, 1:2]) %>%
  mutate(Cluster = cluster_features$Cluster)

pca_var_exp <- summary(pca_res)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100

ggplot(pca_df %>% sample_n(min(5000, nrow(pca_df))),
       aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Cluster)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 1) +
  stat_ellipse(linewidth = 1.2, level = 0.80) +
  labs(
    title    = "Customer Clusters — PCA Projection",
    subtitle = sprintf("PC1 = %.1f%% var | PC2 = %.1f%% var | K = %d clusters",
                       pca_var_exp[1], pca_var_exp[2], optimal_k),
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(pca_var_exp[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(pca_var_exp[2], 1), "%)")
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
```

```{r overall_cluster_profile, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BƯỚC 5: CLUSTER PROFILING — Ý nghĩa kinh doanh từng cụm
# ==========================================================================
cluster_profile <- cluster_features %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    N             = n(),
    Median_Recency    = round(median(expm1(Recency), na.rm = TRUE)),
    Median_Frequency  = round(median(expm1(Frequency), na.rm = TRUE)),
    Median_Revenue    = round(median(expm1(total_revenue), na.rm = TRUE)),
    Median_AOV        = round(median(expm1(AOV), na.rm = TRUE)),
    Churn_Rate        = round(mean(expm1(is_dynamic_churned), na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Persona = case_when(
      Median_Revenue == max(Median_Revenue) & Median_Frequency == max(Median_Frequency) ~
        "👑 VIP / Champions",
      Churn_Rate == max(Churn_Rate) ~
        "💤 High-Risk / Lapsed",
      Median_Frequency > median(Median_Frequency) & Median_Revenue > median(Median_Revenue) ~
        "⭐ Loyal & Growing",
      TRUE ~
        "🌱 New / Occasional"
    )
  )

kable(cluster_profile,
      digits  = c(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 3, 0),
      caption = "Cluster Profiles — Business Personas",
      col.names = c("Cluster", "N", "Median Recency (days)",
                    "Median Freq", "Median Revenue", "Median AOV",
                    "Churn Rate", "Persona"),
      format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(8, bold = TRUE)
```

## OV-3. Overall Churn & LTV Scorecard

```{r overall_business_scorecard, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# BẢNG TỔNG HỢP KPI TOÀN DATASET
# ==========================================================================
snapshot_date <- max(df_delivered$order_date, na.rm = TRUE)

overall_kpi <- tibble(
  KPI = c(
    "Total Customers (delivered orders)",
    "Active Customers (not churned)",
    "Overall Churn Rate",
    "Overall Retention Rate (M1→M2)",
    "Median Customer LTV (all time)",
    "Avg Annual LTV (annualised)",
    "Avg Inter-Order Gap (days)",
    "Core Customer Share",
    "Top Channel by LTV"
  ),
  Value = c(
    comma(n_distinct(df_delivered$customer_id)),
    comma(sum(lifecycle_full$is_dynamic_churned == 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    percent(mean(lifecycle_full$is_dynamic_churned, na.rm = TRUE), accuracy = 0.1),
    {
      m0 <- df_delivered %>%
        mutate(m = floor_date(order_date, "month")) %>%
        group_by(customer_id) %>%
        summarise(first_m = min(m), .groups = "drop")
      m1 <- df_delivered %>%
        mutate(m = floor_date(order_date, "month")) %>%
        left_join(m0, by = "customer_id") %>%
        filter(m == first_m + months(1)) %>%
        pull(customer_id) %>% n_distinct()
      m0_n <- n_distinct(m0$customer_id)
      percent(m1 / m0_n, accuracy = 0.1)
    },
    comma(round(median(rfm_behavior$total_revenue, na.rm = TRUE))),
    comma(round(mean((rfm_behavior$total_revenue /
                       pmax(rfm_behavior$tenure_days, 1)) * 365,
                     na.rm = TRUE))),
    round(median(inter_order_delivered$Gap_Days, na.rm = TRUE)),
    percent(mean(rfm_final$Customer_Type == "Core", na.rm = TRUE), accuracy = 0.1),
    channel_ltv %>% slice_max(Median_Annual_LTV, n = 1) %>% pull(acquisition_channel)
  )
)

kable(overall_kpi,
      caption = "Business Health Scorecard — Overall Dataset",
      col.names = c("KPI", "Value")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE) %>%
  column_spec(2, color = "#1a5276")
```

## OV-4. Prescriptive — Strategic Roadmap

```{r overall_prescriptive_roadmap, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# MA TRẬN HÀNH ĐỘNG CHIẾN LƯỢC TỔNG THỂ
# ==========================================================================
library(tibble)

strategic_roadmap <- tribble(
  ~Priority, ~Time_Horizon, ~Initiative,                           ~Target_Segment,             ~Channel,               ~Expected_Impact,
  "P0",      "0–30 days",   "Win-back: Top 10% churned by LTV",   "High-Value Churned",        "SMS + Direct Email",   "Revenue recovery từ cohort giá trị cao",
  "P0",      "0–30 days",   "Trigger campaign at Dynamic Threshold","Needs Attention / At-risk", "Email Automation",     "Giảm churn rate thêm 5–8%",
  "P1",      "30–90 days",  "Loyalty VIP tier cho Champions",      "Champions + Loyal",         "In-app + Direct",      "Tăng Frequency + referral effect",
  "P1",      "30–90 days",  "Budget reallocation: Scale Tier 1",   "All new acquisitions",      "Paid Search / Email",  "Tối ưu CAC, tăng LTV:CAC ratio",
  "P1",      "30–90 days",  "Personalised cross-sell (RF model)",  "Potential Loyalist",        "Social Retargeting",   "Tăng AOV 10–15% nhóm mid-tier",
  "P2",      "90–180 days", "Cohort A/B test: Channel vs. LTV",   "New acquisitions only",     "Paid vs. Organic",     "Xác nhận causal effect của channel",
  "P2",      "90–180 days", "Subscription / Bundle offer test",   "Core + High-Freq",          "Email + In-app",       "Tăng predictable MRR",
  "P3",      "180+ days",   "Predictive LTV at acquisition",      "All new users",             "Paid Media DSP",       "Bid optimisation dựa trên predicted LTV",
  "P3",      "180+ days",   "Dynamic pricing by segment",         "Price Sensitive vs. Core",  "All channels",         "Tối ưu margin, giảm over-discounting"
)

kable(strategic_roadmap,
      caption = "Overall Prescriptive Strategic Roadmap",
      col.names = c("Priority", "Time Horizon", "Initiative",
                    "Target Segment", "Channel", "Expected Impact")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE, font_size = 11) %>%
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE,
              color = ifelse(strategic_roadmap$Priority == "P0", "white", "black"),
              background = ifelse(strategic_roadmap$Priority == "P0", "#C0392B",
                           ifelse(strategic_roadmap$Priority == "P1", "#F9E79F",
                           ifelse(strategic_roadmap$Priority == "P2", "#D5F5E3",
                                  "white")))) %>%
  column_spec(6, italic = TRUE, color = "#1a5276")
```

```{r overall_prescriptive_summary, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==========================================================================
# EXECUTIVE SUMMARY — 5 INSIGHT CHÍNH
# ==========================================================================
cat("
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║         EXECUTIVE SUMMARY — EDA PRESCRIPTIVE INSIGHTS           ║
╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣
║                                                                  ║
║  1. CORE CUSTOMERS (~RFM tier) chiếm thiểu số nhưng đóng góp   ║
║     phần lớn revenue → Ưu tiên bảo vệ và nurture nhóm này.     ║
║                                                                  ║
║  2. CUSTOMER LIFECYCLE: Inter-order gap rất khác nhau theo      ║
║     RFM segment. Trigger campaign tại 1.5× median gap của       ║
║     từng segment thay vì dùng ngưỡng cố định.                   ║
║                                                                  ║
║  3. ACQUISITION CHANNEL: Không phải kênh lớn nhất = tốt nhất.  ║
║     Cần đo LTV:CAC per channel. Scale budget vào Tier 1,        ║
║     tối ưu Tier 2, và test lại Tier 3.                         ║
║                                                                  ║
║  4. CHURN PREDICTION (XGBoost): Chỉ win-back khách có           ║
║     0.4 < P(churn) < 0.85 — đây là 'vùng cứu được'.           ║
║     Nhóm P(churn) > 0.85 → drop sang email passive.            ║
║                                                                  ║
║  5. REVENUE FORECAST: Dùng ARIMA để set monthly targets và      ║
║     alert khi actual < lower bound forecast → trigger           ║
║     investigation ngay trong tháng.                             ║
║                                                                  ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
")
```

```{r churn fixed}
# =====================================================================
# THỐNG NHẤT LOGIC CHURN THEO DYNAMIC THRESHOLD (126 - 423 - 759)
# =====================================================================

library(dplyr)
library(scales)

# 1. Tạo bảng tra cứu ngưỡng (Mapping thresholds từ segment_churn_rules của mày)
threshold_lookup <- tibble(
  Customer_Type = c("Whale/B2B", "Core", "Non-Core"),
  Dynamic_Limit = c(126, 423, 759) # Lấy đúng số từ bảng mày gửi
)

# 2. Xác định những người từng Win-back thành công (Từng có 1 lần Gap > Threshold)
# Lưu ý: inter_order_delivered chứa lịch sử tất cả các Gap trong quá khứ
successful_winbacks <- inter_order_delivered %>%
  left_join(rfm_final %>% select(customer_id, Customer_Type), by = "customer_id") %>%
  left_join(threshold_lookup, by = "Customer_Type") %>%
  # Nếu Gap_Days trong quá khứ từng có lần nào lớn hơn ngưỡng của nhóm đó -> Đã từng Churn
  filter(Gap_Days > Dynamic_Limit) %>%
  distinct(customer_id) %>%
  mutate(has_ever_returned = TRUE)

# 3. Gộp vào bảng Master để phân loại trạng thái cuối cùng
master_churn_report <- lifecycle_full %>%
  select(customer_id, Customer_Type, Recency) %>%
  left_join(threshold_lookup, by = "Customer_Type") %>%
  left_join(successful_winbacks, by = "customer_id") %>%
  mutate(
    has_ever_returned = coalesce(has_ever_returned, FALSE),
    # A. TRẠNG THÁI HIỆN TẠI
    is_currently_active = ifelse(Recency <= Dynamic_Limit, 1, 0),
    
    # B. TỔNG SỐ KHÁCH TỪNG RỜI BỎ (EVER CHURNED)
    # Bao gồm: người đang rụng + người từng rụng nhưng đã quay lại (win-back)
    is_ever_churned = ifelse(Recency > Dynamic_Limit | has_ever_returned == TRUE, 1, 0)
  )

# 4. TÍNH TOÁN CÁC CHỈ SỐ CHO REPORT
total_n <- nrow(master_churn_report)
n_active <- sum(master_churn_report$is_currently_active)
n_ever_churned <- sum(master_churn_report$is_ever_churned)
n_winback_total <- sum(master_churn_report$has_ever_returned)

# Tính sâu hơn cho nhóm Winback (Những người đã được cứu)
winback_group <- master_churn_report %>% filter(has_ever_returned == TRUE)
n_wb_active <- sum(winback_group$is_currently_active)
n_wb_rechurn <- nrow(winback_group) - n_wb_active

# 5. IN KẾT QUẢ ĐỂ ĐIỀN VÀO REPORT
cat("--- CON SỐ CHUẨN ĐỂ ĐIỀN VÀO REPORT ---\n")
cat(sprintf("Tổng khách hàng: %s\n", comma(total_n)))
cat(sprintf("Đang hoạt động (Active): %s (%f%%)\n", comma(n_active), 100*n_active/total_n))
cat(sprintf("Từng rời bỏ (Ever Churned): %s (%f%%)\n", comma(n_ever_churned), 100*n_ever_churned/total_n))
cat(sprintf("Cứu vãn thành công (Win-back): %s (%f%% của nhóm từng Churn)\n", 
            comma(n_winback_total), 100*n_winback_total/n_ever_churned))
cat(sprintf("Trong số quay lại: %f%% vẫn Active, %f%% đã tái rời bỏ (Re-churn)\n", 
            100*n_wb_active/n_winback_total, 100*n_wb_rechurn/n_winback_total))

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)

# Lấy các chỉ số trung vị từ bảng master feature của mày
# Lưu ý: Dùng customer_features (bảng đã aggregate theo customer_id)
metrics <- customer_features %>%
  summarise(
    med_monetary = median(Monetary, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_recency  = median(Recency, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_aov      = median(AOV, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# In kết quả ra để copy vào báo cáo
cat(glue::glue("
  - Doanh thu trung vị: {dollar(metrics$med_monetary)}
  - Thời gian Recency trung vị: {round(metrics$med_recency)} ngày
  - AOV trung vị: {dollar(metrics$med_aov)}
"))


```
